summary: Iteration 39: Agency Reports, Global Search, Operations Report Generation, and Admin Tenant Features Testing. All backend APIs passed (8/8 agency endpoints, 6/6 admin endpoints). Frontend UI testing passed for Reports page and Admin Tenant Features page. Key features validated: global search with agency/organization scope, /api/reports/generate with tenant fallback (fixes tenant_context_missing error from previous iteration), subscription cancel dialog, and plan change impact UX.
passed_tests: Agency Login: POST /api/auth/login - 200
Agency Hotels: GET /api/agency/hotels - 200 (returns list)
Agency Bookings: GET /api/agency/bookings - 200
Agency Settlements: GET /api/agency/settlements?month=2026-03 - 200
Global Search (Agency): GET /api/search?q=demo - 200, scope=agency, 4 results
Reports Generate (Agency): GET /api/reports/generate?days=30 - 200, KPIs returned (7 bookings, 1250 TRY)
Sales Summary: GET /api/reports/sales-summary?days=14 - 200
CSV Export: GET /api/reports/sales-summary.csv - 200, Content-Type=text/csv
Admin Login: POST /api/auth/login - 200
Admin Tenants: GET /api/admin/tenants - 200 (28 tenants with summary)
Admin Tenant Features: GET /api/admin/tenants/{id}/features - 200 (plan, add_ons, plan_matrix)
Admin Tenant Subscription: GET /api/admin/billing/tenants/{id}/subscription - 200 (status, plan, period_end)
Admin Global Search: GET /api/search?q=test - 200, scope=organization
Admin Reports Generate: GET /api/reports/generate?days=30 - 200 (26 bookings, 22600 TRY)
UI: Reports page loads with data-testid=reports-page
UI: Global search card functional (data-testid=global-search-card, global-search-input, global-search-submit-button)
UI: Search results displayed correctly (data-testid=global-search-results)
UI: Operations report generation works (data-testid=generate-operations-report-button)
UI: Report KPI cards displayed (data-testid=generated-report-booking-count, generated-report-revenue)
UI: Admin Tenant Features page loads (data-testid=admin-tenant-features-page)
UI: Tenant summary cards display (data-testid=tenant-summary-total, tenant-summary-payment-issue, tenant-summary-trial)
UI: Tenant filter bar functional (data-testid=tenant-filter-active, tenant-filter-payment_issue)
UI: Tenant selection shows features panel
UI: Subscription panel shows plan, status, renewal date (data-testid=sub-panel)
UI: Cancel subscription button visible for active subscriptions (data-testid=cancel-sub-btn)
UI: Subscription cancel confirm dialog opens correctly (data-testid=subscription-cancel-confirm-dialog)
critical_code_review_comments: SUCCESS: /api/reports/generate tenant fallback implemented in _resolve_report_tenant_id() at reports.py lines 178-191
SUCCESS: Global search /api/search correctly scopes to agency when user has agency_id, else organization
SUCCESS: AdminTenantFeaturesPage.jsx implements subscription cancel dialog with data-testid attributes
SUCCESS: Plan change impact card shows when plan differs from initial (PlanChangeImpactCard component)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 validated all requested features: agency reports page, global search, operations report generation with tenant fallback, sales summary CSV export, admin tenant features with subscription cancel dialog. Tenant tenant_context_missing error from previous iteration is now FIXED - _resolve_report_tenant_id() falls back to first tenant in organization if user lacks tenant_id. 28 tenants exist in system with 5 payment issues, 15 trials, 5 active. Billing QA Travel tenant (ec68a5dc-fd72-4bb3-b679-0416b616aee1) has active Pro subscription for testing cancel flows.

feature_validation_summary.agency_reports_page_load: PASS - Page loads with all expected UI elements
feature_validation_summary.global_search_api: PASS - Returns sectioned results (customers, bookings, hotels, tours) with correct scope
feature_validation_summary.reports_generate_api: PASS - Tenant fallback fix working, returns KPIs and daily_revenue
feature_validation_summary.sales_summary_csv: PASS - Returns CSV content with correct Content-Type
feature_validation_summary.admin_tenant_list: PASS - Returns 28 tenants with lifecycle_stage and summary
feature_validation_summary.admin_tenant_features: PASS - Returns plan, add_ons, plan_matrix, plan_catalog
feature_validation_summary.admin_subscription_panel: PASS - Shows subscription status, plan, renewal date
feature_validation_summary.subscription_cancel_dialog: PASS - Opens correctly with confirm/cancel buttons
feature_validation_summary.plan_change_impact_card: NOT TESTED - Same plan selected, no change to trigger

mocked_apis.note: Mock PMS provider behind /api/agency/search availability flow - not tested in this iteration
